data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of full traceability from intake answers to final quoted lines.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of full traceability from intake answers to final quoted lines. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this traceability, leading to an inconclusive result. The linked use case mentions the need for this traceability, but without specific evidence, the requirement cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of full traceability from intake answers to final quoted lines.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the traceability requirement.
